## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] I edited files under `data/`, not `README.md` directly (or this is a tooling/docs PR).
- [ ] I ran `node scripts/validate.js` and it printed `✓ Validation passed.`
- [ ] Each entry uses values from the controlled vocab (`schema/vocab.yml`) for `license`, `entry_type`, `tags.workflow`, `tags.output`, `tags.platform`, `tags.skill`.
- [ ] No affiliate / sponsored / paywalled-only links without disclosure.
- [ ] One resource per PR where possible (faster to review and merge).
